heading: Documentary evidence requirement for Government obligations
label: 1501 Documentary evidence requirement for Government obligations
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised SectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)1501(a)31:200(a)., (e), , 831.Aug. 26, 1954, ch. 935, § 1311(a)68 Stat. 8301501(b)31:200(e).In subsection (a), before clause (1), the words “After ” are omitted as executed. In clause (1), the words “an agency and another person (including an agency)” are substituted for “the parties thereto, including Government agencies” for clarity. In clause (2), the word “valid” is omitted as unnecessary. In clause (6), the words “brought under authority of law” are omitted as surplus. In clause (9), the word “legally” is omitted as surplus.August 26, 1954In subsection (b), the words “consistent with” are substituted for “as defined in” for clarity and for consistency with section 1108 of the revised title. The word “valid” is omitted as unnecessary.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevised SectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)1501(a)31:200(a)., (e), , 831.Aug. 26, 1954, ch. 935, § 1311(a)68 Stat. 8301501(b)31:200(e).In subsection (a), before clause (1), the words “After ” are omitted as executed. In clause (1), the words “an agency and another person (including an agency)” are substituted for “the parties thereto, including Government agencies” for clarity. In clause (2), the word “valid” is omitted as unnecessary. In clause (6), the words “brought under authority of law” are omitted as surplus. In clause (9), the word “legally” is omitted as surplus.August 26, 1954In subsection (b), the words “consistent with” are substituted for “as defined in” for clarity and for consistency with section 1108 of the revised title. The word “valid” is omitted as unnecessary.

children.label: A
children.text: in writing, in a way and form, and for a purpose authorized by law; and

children.label: B
children.text: executed before the end of the period of availability for obligation of the appropriation or fund used for specific goods to be delivered, real property to be bought or leased, or work or service to be provided;
a loan agreement showing the amount and terms of repayment;
an order required by law to be placed with an agency;

children.label: A
children.text: when necessary because of a public exigency;

children.label: A
children.text: from appropriations made for payment of, or contributions to, amounts required to be paid in specific amounts fixed by law or under formulas prescribed by law;

children.label: B
children.text: under an agreement authorized by law; or

children.label: C
children.text: under plans approved consistent with and authorized by law;
a liability that may result from pending litigation;
employment or services of persons or expenses of travel under law;
services provided by public utilities; or
other legal liability of the Government against an available appropriation or fund.

children.label: b
children.text: A statement of obligations provided to Congress or a committee of Congress by an agency shall include only those amounts that are obligations consistent with subsection (a) of this section.
